overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban district. The player character descends from a covered walkway into a bustling commercial plaza with massive digital billboards, then navigates through food stalls and narrow alleyways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with descending stairs

events.description: descending stairs and approaching a pedestrian ahead in the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking down a covered concrete stairway with blue ambient lighting and linear wall fixtures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance of the covered walkway

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the covered walkway with recessed lighting
concrete stairs with metal handrails descending downward
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the concrete walls
illuminated vending machine with glowing display on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered concrete walkway with blue ambient lighting. The player descends a staircase, passing wall-mounted linear lights and a vending machine, approaching a distant pedestrian figure at the walkway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with massive digital billboards

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with large vertical digital billboards
lighting shifts from blue ambient to bright multicolored neon from surrounding billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza surrounded by towering buildings with bright digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking across the plaza
person standing near a storefront entrance

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying 'WET DREAM' in bright pink neon text
vertical billboard with '3mouths 1 Dream' text and graphic design
multi-story building with glass facades and illuminated signage
ground floor commercial shops with awnings and neon signs

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast neon-lit plaza dominated by massive digital billboards displaying advertisements. The lighting shifts dramatically to vibrant pinks and cyans as the player walks past street-level shops and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street beneath elevated transit structure

events.description: walks under an elevated overpass or transit rail structure
turns left toward a food stall area with green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating under the metal overpass and approaching street vendors and food counters

notable_agents.action: person in yellow pants standing near a food counter
pedestrian walking away from camera under the overpass

entered.detail: metal transit structure with beams spanning across the street overhead
open-air food counter with stools and overhead lighting
red illuminated vending machine with product display

segments.scene_description: The player moves under an elevated transit structure, entering a semi-covered commercial area with food stalls. The lighting becomes mixed with shadows from the overpass and colorful neon from nearby signs. Pedestrians populate the area near food counters.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor plaza with holographic displays

events.description: encounters a food stall featuring a holographic projection of a cook
moves from open vendor area toward a narrower alley entrance

agents.ego_description: walking past various food stalls and examining the holographic vendor displays and neon signage

notable_agents.action: holographic projection of a cook working at a food preparation station
customer sitting on a stool at the food counter

entered.detail: translucent blue hologram of a chef working at a food stall
food preparation area illuminated with green neon lighting
blue and yellow automated food kiosk with glowing interface
tree with pink illuminated blossoms visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The player explores a food vendor area featuring a striking holographic cook projection at a green-lit stall. Various vending machines and neon signs line the street as the scene transitions toward a darker, narrower alley entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with service entrances and debris

events.description: lighting becomes darker and more confined entering the narrow alley
approaches a corrugated metal door at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow alleyway toward a doorway, passing pedestrians and debris

notable_agents.action: muscular pedestrian in tank top walking toward camera
person sitting on the ground near trash bags

entered.detail: tall concrete walls enclosing the narrow passage on both sides
corrugated metal security door at the end of the alley
illuminated neon sign reading 'OPEN' in red and blue
pile of garbage bags and scattered trash on the ground

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a narrow, dimly lit alley with graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris. The player passes a neon 'OPEN' sign and approaches a corrugated metal door at the alley's end, while pedestrians move through the confined space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dim, enclosed corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins within a covered concrete walkway bathed in blue ambient light, descending a staircase past linear wall lights and a vending machine toward a distant pedestrian. As the camera exits the walkway, the environment opens abruptly into a vast plaza where the lighting shifts to vibrant pinks and cyans under the glow of massive digital billboards. The scene then transitions beneath an elevated transit structure, moving from the open square into a semi-covered commercial area. Finally, the camera navigates through a mix of deep shadows and colorful neon signs, passing food stalls and crowds of pedestrians.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit food plaza into the claustrophobic depths of a gritty urban alley. It begins amidst a cluster of vending machines and glowing signs, passing a striking holographic cook projection at a green-lit food stall. As the camera moves forward, the open commercial space narrows and the bright lights fade, transitioning the scene toward a darker, more confined entrance. The environment then shifts into a dimly lit alleyway characterized by graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris, where the camera passes a flickering neon OPEN sign. Finally, the movement continues through the crowded passage, weaving past pedestrians before approaching a corrugated metal door at the alley's end.
